news.headline: Global artificial intelligence market to grow by USD 64.9 billion (2024-2028), driven by AI solution demand, showing 45.1% CAGR.
news.summary: According to a recent report utilizing AI technology, the global market for artificial intelligence platforms is forecasted to increase by approximately USD 64.9 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 45.1% over this period.

news.headline: Apple market to increase by USD 14.71B from 2024-2028 due to rising demand for superfoods, driven by AI trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market. Over the period of 2024 to 2028, the global apple market is expected to increase by USD 14.71 billion as projected by Technavio. The market is forecasted to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.25% during this period.

news.headline: Tax on cloud computing could hinder Chicago’s tech growth. Numbers not provided.
Popular Science reveals 50 groundbreaking products in 10 categories with the Best of What's New Awards for 2024.
news.summary: The Best of What's New Awards celebrate 50 revolutionary products in 10 categories, as announced by Popular Science. These prestigious awards recognize the most innovative and groundbreaking products released in the past year. This year's winners represent cutting-edge advancements across various fields, highlighting the latest in technology, design, and ingenuity. The annual awards ceremony showcases top performers in 10 distinct categories, acknowledging their significant contributions to industry advancement.

news.headline: Park Aerospace Corp. (NYSE: PKE) announces cash dividend of $0.125 per share, payable on Feb 4, 2025 to shareholders of record on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Newton, Kansas, on December 9, 2024, the Board of Directors of Park Aerospace Corp. announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.125 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on February 4, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on January 3, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PKE, continues to provide value to its shareholders through this dividend declaration.

news.headline: CEO of Balsam Hill to share holiday decorating tips on Bloomberg.
Prospect Capital hosting webinar on preferred stocks' benefits for financial pros on Dec. 12, 2024, at 2:00 pm ET. Earn 1 CE Credit.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) announced an upcoming webinar for financial professionals addressing "Preferred Stock as a Low Volatility, Downside Protected, and Income Generating Asset Class." This event, scheduled for December 12, 2024, at 2:00pm ET, aims to offer insights into the unique aspects of preferred stock as compared to other fixed income investments. Attendees can register for the webinar online. The presentation is eligible for 1 CFP® / IWI / CFA CE Credit.

news.headline: Commercial real estate faces uncertainties as it enters 2025, with investors spotting potential upside.
Person of interest Luigi Mangione identified in UnitedHealthcare murder probe, investigation ongoing. #news #murder #probe
Pasqua Wines showcases a new installation at Saatchi Gallery, London, merging art and winemaking. NEW YORK, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Pasqua Wines strengthens its dedication to the global art community by showcasing a bold new exhibit at Saatchi Gallery. This installation is a grand display of art, creativity, and the craft of winemaking. The event occurred on December 9, 2024, in New York City. This display highlights Pasqua's ongoing commitment to intertwining artistry with wine production.

news.headline: Companies with higher representation of women on their boards tend to outperform others, as per reports by Business Insider.
Inventor from Ohio creates Pregnancy Panties for pregnant women with bladder issues, aims for comfort and support.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Lancaster, Ohio, expressed the motivation behind creating a new product. The inventor shared that the goal was to provide a comfortable and hygienic solution for pregnant women dealing with bladder leaks or control problems. This innovation led to the creation of the PREGNANCY PANTIES. The specially designed underwear aims to offer support and absorbency for expecting mothers facing such challenges.

news.headline: Chicago’s tech hub progress at risk due to potential tax on cloud services, causing concern in the industry.
Brent Crude futures settle at $72.14/bbl, up $1.02, 1.43%.
Canada's gift card market to reach $9.4 billion by 2028, with 6.5% annual growth to $7.7 billion in 2024. Local programs gaining traction.
news.summary: A recent report, "Canada Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook," has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The gift card sector in Canada is projected to experience a 6.5% annual growth rate, reaching US$7.7 billion by 2024. Furthermore, the Canadian gift card market is anticipated to maintain growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.9% expected between 2024 and 2028. Presently valued at US$7.3 billion, the gift card industry in Canada is set to expand significantly.

news.headline: Fortis Inc. renews its ATM Equity Program, allowing issuance of up to C$500 million (or USD equivalent) of Common Shares.
news.summary: St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Dec. 09, 2024 - Fortis Inc. (TSX/NYSE: FTS) revealed its decision to renew the at-the-market equity program (ATM Program), permitting the Corporation to offer up to C$500,000,000 (or its U.S. dollar equivalent) of common shares (Common Shares) from treasury to the public intermittently at the Corporation's discretion. Common Shares under the ATM Program will be vended through the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX), the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), or any other applicable marketplace where the Common Shares are listed or traded at the current market price.

news.headline: "Taste the Difference" campaign brings quality European wines to US, partners with Italian & Spanish institutions. NYC highlighted. EU-funded program.
news.summary: Italian and Spanish institutions have joined forces to promote the PDO and PGI European Quality Schemes. In a recent collaboration, these renowned establishments are working towards enhancing awareness of the program. The initiative, known as Taste the Difference: Quality Wines from the heart of Europe (TTD), is supported by the European Union. This partnership aims to boost recognition of European quality standards. This announcement was made in New York on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Six Flags-Cedar Fair merger yields $200 million in synergies, analyst predicts significant growth potential. Katz initiates Buy rating, $59 target price. Smooth integration anticipated with minimal park overlap.
news.summary: Analyst David Katz from Jefferies has initiated coverage on Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (NYSE: FUN) with a Buy rating and a price target of $59.00. Katz believes that the merger between Six Flags and Cedar Fair presents a strong long-term opportunity, with Cedar Fair's management well-positioned to unlock significant earnings potential. On July 1, the merger between legacy Cedar Fair and legacy Six Flags was finalized, forming the new combined company, Six Flags Entertainment Corporation. Katz anticipates a smooth integration due to minimal geographic overlap between the two companies' parks. Additionally, he foresees Cedar Fair's management maximizing the value of Six Flags' assets and achieving substantial gains from the merger.

news.headline: Seattle Orcas & Boys & Girls Clubs of Bellevue team up for Holiday Cricket & Sports Equipment Drive, fostering grassroots access to the sport.
news.summary: In Seattle, the Orcas have partnered with the Boys & Girls Clubs of Bellevue to gather cricket gear for young athletes in the area. They aim to enhance grassroots access to the sport by inviting community members to participate. The collaboration was announced on December 9, 2024, with the initiative focusing on collecting holiday cricket and sports equipment. This joint effort seeks to support local youth by providing them with the necessary gear for their athletic endeavors.

news.headline: Inventor from Mount Vernon, Ohio creates ALPHA S E L T Z E R formula to prevent hangovers; low-calorie formula.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Mount Vernon, Ohio, revealed the creation of ALPHA S E L T Z E R, a low-calorie formula designed to combat hangover symptoms resulting from excessive drinking the night before. The inventor aimed to help individuals prevent hangovers by introducing this innovative product.

news.headline: NYMEX Gasoline January futures settle at $1.9525 a gallon.
NYMEX Natural Gas January futures settle at $3.1820/MMBtu.
NYMEX WTI Crude January futures settle at $68.37 a barrel.
NYMEX Diesel January futures settle at $2.1835 a gallon.
Coinbase had record-breaking December trading volumes, target price raised to $420; Q4 projections: $435 billion in trading volume, $2.1 billion revenue. Despite this, stock dipped 8% to $316.01.
news.summary: Needham & Company has upped its price target for Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) to $420 from $375, attributing the increase to the platform's unprecedented December trading volumes and escalated altcoin activity. The analysts mentioned a surge in volatility and a surge driven by retail investors contributing to a significant month for the platform. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reaching over $100,000 and the rise in altcoin trading have been major drivers of this momentum. Needham's projections for Q4 involve anticipating $435 billion in trading volume and $2.1 billion in revenue. Looking ahead to 2025, Coinbase is projected to rake in $8.9 billion in revenue, boasting earnings per share of $9.61. However, despite these records, Coinbase's stock experienced an 8% dip on Monday, trading at $316.01 as of 12:28 p.m. ET, which reflects the broader market trends.

news.headline: Krispy Kreme offers BOGO deal on 12/12 - buy 1 dozen, get 1 free Original Glazed dozen at participating shops.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Krispy Kreme is spreading holiday cheer by enhancing their annual "Day of the Dozens" promotion on 12/12. On this day, customers can enjoy a free dozen Original Glazed® Doughnuts when purchasing any dozen at regular price. This offer is available in-store and via drive-thru, with a limit of two free dozens per guest at participating locations. Krispy Kreme is inviting fans to indulge in this festive treat for themselves and their loved ones, continuing the celebration of the holiday season.

news.headline: IWMF receives $1.2M grant for journalism initiative in Ukraine, continuing legacy of supporting reporters.
news.summary: A prominent international NGO, the International Women's Media Foundation (IWMF), has recently confirmed obtaining a significant $1.2 million grant from the Howard G. Buffett Foundation. This funding is set to support the organization in maintaining its longstanding tradition of offering journalists exclusive and expansive reporting initiatives. With a track record spanning several decades, the IWMF continues to provide rare opportunities for media professionals. This latest financial injection is poised to further strengthen the foundation's efforts in empowering women in media and facilitating impactful storytelling on a global scale.

news.headline: Saab gets $48M order for Giraffe 4A radar systems from BAE Systems for US Air Forces in Europe. Deliveries to start in 2027.
news.summary: Saab, based in Stockholm, announced on December 9, 2024, that it secured a contract from BAE Systems to supply multiple Giraffe 4A radar systems for the U.S. Air Forces in Europe. The deal is valued at around $48 million (approximately 525 million Swedish Krona). The deliveries are scheduled to commence in 2027. The Giraffe 4A radar systems aim to deliver long-range capabilities for enhanced military operations.

news.headline: UK PM aims to reconfigure ties with EU, says Reeves. #Brexit #UK #EU
Bardstown Bourbon Company & Brindiamo launch barrel leasing program for whiskey brands; ~1/3 cost of new fill barrel tied up.
news.summary: In Bardstown, Kentucky, Bardstown Bourbon Company and Brindiamo have joined forces to introduce an exclusive barrel leasing program for whiskey brand contract distillation customers, aiming to cater to the changing whiskey market. This initiative offers a specialized financing option for non-distilling brands, where approximately one-third of the expense for a new fill barrel is involved. This collaboration seeks to provide a competitive edge in the industry, with Bardstown Bourbon Company being a prominent custom American whiskey distiller and Brindiamo leading in sourcing bulk whiskey.

news.headline: Mondelēz Global LLC partners with ISN to enhance contractor management, enhancing safety and compliance across its North America sites.
news.summary: ISN, a top provider of contractor and supplier information management services, is broadening its collaboration with Mondelēz Global LLC, a prominent player in the candy and confectionery sector. This enhanced partnership aims to enhance contractor safety and compliance at Mondelēz's North America manufacturing facilities. ISN will facilitate contractor oversight, training, and compliance tracking, bolstering safety measures across these sites. By leveraging ISN's expanded capabilities, such as contractor training and badging via their Em platform, Mondelēz seeks a more robust safety framework.

news.headline: Synthetic Biology Market valued at USD 15.20B in 2023, expected to reach USD 59.91B by 2029 with CAGR of 25.68%. Report includes analysis of 38 vendors.
news.summary: A recently added report titled "Synthetic Biology Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2023, the Synthetic Biology Market held a value of USD 15.20 Billion and is projected to achieve USD 59.91 Billion by 2029, indicating a growth rate of 25.68% during this period. The global market for synthetic biology features data on 38 vendors and is acknowledged to be fiercely competitive. Key industry players include Agilent Technologies, Codexis, Eurofins Scientific, Illumina, and Nov.

news.headline: Auto parts market to grow by USD 354.9 billion from 2024-2028 due to tech advancements. AI transforming industry - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a report detailing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends revealed that the global auto parts market is projected to increase by USD 354.9 billion between 2024 and 2028, as estimated by Technavio. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.2% throughout the forecast period. This growth is driven by factors such as increased demand...

news.headline: Ascendia Pharmaceuticals rebranded to Ascendia Pharmaceutical Solutions to expand capabilities, led by CEO Jim Huang.
news.summary: A prominent Pharmaceutical Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO), previously known as Ascendia Pharmaceuticals, has undergone a rebranding to better showcase its growing capabilities. The announcement was made by Jim Huang, Ph.D., the founder and CEO of the company. The rebranding was officially unveiled in North Brunswick, N.J., on December 9, 2024. This move signals the company's evolution and expansion in the pharmaceutical industry.

news.headline: EUROAPI undergoes leadership changes: Emmanuel Blin appointed Chair, David Seignolle named CEO. Elizabeth Bastoni steps down as Lead Director.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, EUROAPI is transitioning into a new phase with the establishment and financing of the FOCUS-27 strategic plan. Viviane Monges and Ludwig de Mot have stepped down as the Director, Chair of the Board, and Chief Executive Officer respectively. Taking their place are Emmanuel Blin as Chair of the Board and David Seignolle as Chief Executive Officer. This change in leadership prompted Elizabeth Bastoni to resign as Independent Lead Director, although she will continue to serve as Chair of the Nominations and Compensation Committee.

news.headline: Solana's Jupiter DeFi Exchange receives approval for airdrops post $1.7B proposal rejection by token holders.
news.summary: After initially rejecting a plan to distribute $1.7 billion in JUP tokens, Jupiter token holders have now approved a revised proposal for a pair of airdrops. The new proposal garnered support from the token holders, indicating a shift in their decision-making. This development highlights the significant amount of funds involved in the distribution of tokens and the importance of community input in such decisions.

news.headline: Zeta Global responds to Omnicom's plan to acquire IPG, as announced during Zeta Data Summit; David Steinberg comments.
news.summary: Zeta Global, a marketing cloud powered by AI, recently commented on Omnicom's decision to acquire Interpublic Group of Companies, Inc. Zeta Global's CEO, David Steinberg, discussed the news during the Zeta Data Summit. The summit covered various topics and included insight from Steinberg. Zeta Global is listed on the NYSE under the symbol ZETA, and their statement follows Omnicom’s move to acquire IPG. The acquisition deal is a significant development in the marketing industry.

news.headline: SiC Power Device market grew at 19.33% CAGR from 2020-2023, valued at USD 1.40 billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 7.11 billion in 2030.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Global SiC Power Device Market" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market experienced growth with a CAGR of 19.33% from 2020 to 2023, reaching a value of USD 1.40 billion in 2023. It is projected to further increase and hit USD 7.11 billion by the year 2030. The report analyzes the market based on voltage ranges (300-900 V, 901-1700 V, and Above 1700 V), types, applications, regions, and countries, providing market insights and forecasts for the period 2020-2030.

news.headline: Hyperscale data center market to grow by USD 371.3 billion (2024-2028) due to rising demand for colocation facilities.
news.summary: A recent report on the impact of AI on market trends reveals that the global hyperscale data center market is projected to experience substantial growth in the coming years. Estimates suggest a significant increase of USD 371.3 billion between 2024 and 2028. The market is anticipated to expand at an impressive CAGR of 37.58% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Inventor from Pickerington, Ohio creates SWIFT SIFT, an improved bowl for sifting rice/grains, cutting time in half.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Pickerington, Ohio shared their innovation, the SWIFT SIFT, designed to improve the process of sifting rice and grains. The inventor aimed to offer cleaner and healthier rice in less time, with the new bowl reportedly able to achieve this in 50% less time compared to traditional methods. The SWIFT SIFT invention introduces a more efficient approach to sifting, enhancing the overall experience of preparing rice and grains.

news.headline: Global digital content market set to grow by USD 927 billion from 2024-2028 at CAGR of 15.7%, driven by AI, says Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the influence of AI on market movements, it has been projected that the global digital content market will see significant expansion over the period of 2024-2028, with an estimated growth of USD 927 billion. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is expected to experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.7% throughout the forecasted period. This growth underscores the substantial impact of digital technologies on the global economy.

news.headline: OGeez! introduces sugar free cannabis gummy in Arizona, expanding to New Jersey and Illinois in early 2025. Gift for cannabis community PHOENIX Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: A new sugar-free cannabis gummy has been introduced by the company in Arizona, with intentions to expand its availability to New Jersey and Illinois by early 2025. OGeez! has announced this significant move as a festive gift to the cannabis community, marking its venture into the realm of health-conscious alternatives. The gummy is set to cater to consumers seeking products without added sugar, aligning with the growing demand for healthier options. This strategic rollout indicates a shift towards accommodating diverse consumer preferences and emerging market trends.

news.headline: Swisslog Healthcare partners with BD to automate US hospital pharmacy inventory management with robotic solutions.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Swisslog Healthcare and BD in Broomfield, Colorado. Swisslog Healthcare, a top provider of robotic medication management solutions, and BD, a prominent global medical technology company, have collaborated to provide hospital pharmacies with a comprehensive medication management solution. This strategic alliance combines Swisslog Healthcare's robotics with BD's inventory management and workflow software. The aim is to meet the increasing demand for advanced automated pharmacy solutions. This co-marketing agreement brings together cutting-edge technologies to enhance end-to-end medication management in healthcare facilities.

news.headline: Global Direct Thrombin Inhibitors (DTIs) Market shows growth in cardiovascular care innovations. Download free report.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on December 9, 2024, the Direct Thrombin Inhibitors (DTIs) market is categorized by type into Oral DTIs and Parenteral DTIs, and by application into Thrombocytopenia, Deep Vein Thrombosis, Pulmonary Embolism, and Atrial Fibrillation. The global market for DTIs is a significant segment in the pharmaceutical industry, with a focus on addressing these specific medical conditions.

news.headline: NASA invites media to Panama, Austria Artemis Accords signings on Dec 11 in Washington, led by Admin Bill Nelson.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Panama and Austria are scheduled to sign the Artemis Accords at NASA Headquarters in Washington. After the signing, NASA Administrator Bill Nelson will speak with the media in-person to discuss advancements related to the accord.

news.headline: Hilton's luxury brands achieve record growth in 2025 with 500+ hotels and openings in top destinations.
news.summary: A notable brand growth has been achieved by Hilton through the addition of over 500 hotels and the opening of new locations in popular global destinations such as New York, Costa Rica, Athens, and Osaka. This expansion marks a substantial increase for Hilton's luxury brands, showcasing a record-breaking year of growth in 2024.

news.headline: China-based Drone Maker DJI could be banned from launching new drones in the United States market under legislation before Congress - Company.
Shiba Inu burn rate surges 876%, 40.46 million SHIB coins burnt in single transaction, 250 million burnt prior. Trader optimistic about long-term value, defines SHIB price as 'insanely strong.'
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has witnessed a surge in burn rates despite maintaining stagnant prices. Data from Shibburn indicates that a single transaction resulted in the burning of 40.46 million SHIB coins, causing the burn rate to spike by 876.05%. This comes on the heels of another 250 million SHIB being burned just three days earlier. The move underscores the ongoing initiative to decrease the token supply and boost long-term value for investors. Well-known crypto trader Bluntz Capital has expressed confidence in SHIB, describing it as "insanely strong." Despite showing a strong uptrend, Bluntz pointed out that the meme coin has yet to undergo a parabolic breakout. Additionally, Bluntz observed accumulation in the SHIB/BTC pair.

news.headline: GreenPower partners with new dealer in NJ, PA, and DE, receives initial order of 11 EVs.CppMethodPointer
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Hainesport, New Jersey, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (NASDAQ: GP) (TSXV: GPV) announced its position as a prominent manufacturer and distributor of specialized electric vehicles for the cargo and delivery industry, as well as shuttle services.

news.headline: Inventor unveils BAGGLESS formula in Chicago to reduce eye bags using natural ingredients.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Chicago, Illinois, unveiled the BAGGLESS, a new topical remedy designed to diminish inflammation and under-eye bags efficiently. The inventor shared that the motivation behind creating this product was to provide a solution that guarantees rapid results. The BAGGLESS is made of all-natural ingredients, ensuring a gentle application on the delicate skin around the eyes.
